svg.text: Govern effects, not actions · Execution requires valid lineage
NON-AUTHORITATIVE RUNTIME · PROPOSAL ONLY · NO EXECUTION CAPABILITY
Hash-Chained Lineage · Execution Precondition · Integrity Backbone
No execution without CAT-bound order verification
EXECUTION PRECONDITION · Authorization must be recorded BEFORE execution
No execution without valid CAT-bound order
Execution authority originates here and cannot exist in runtime
Runtime proposes. OE determines. CAT binds. Execution only occurs with verified order.
